node.text: Jolene adopted Susie two years ago when feeling lonely.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "have her pet Susie") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Jolene finds comfort and distraction through her pet Susie and video games during tough times.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "have her pet Susie") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Jolene had a 'snake adventure' where her snake got out, but she found her snuggling under the bed after hours of searching.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "have her pet Susie") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Jolene has a snake as a pet, finds it calming, and a great connection with nature.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "have her pet Susie") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Jolene expressed a desire for some chill time and found the idea of a retreat peaceful.
Jolene expressed interest in new routines to mix things up for self-care.
Jolene is pushing herself to succeed despite feeling overwhelmed.
Jolene plans to go together to the peaceful spot near the lake with Deborah.
